# isolated-function

> Run JavaScript from AI agents, plugins, and workflows in a separate Node.js process with strict safety limits.

isolated-function is a Node.js library for executing code you did not write without giving it full access to your server.

It is designed for:

- AI agent tool execution where user-provided code must run safely
- plugin systems that need constrained runtime permissions
- sandboxed code evaluation for automation workflows
- backend systems that require dependency allowlists and deterministic limits

Key capabilities:

- separate process execution for untrusted code
- memory, timeout, and CPU resource limits
- Node.js permission model integration with granular allowlists
- automatic dependency detection and install with shared cache
- optional dependency allowlist to prevent unsafe package usage
- execution profiling with compile, spawn, run, and total timings

Primary page:

- Docs and landing page: https://kikobeats.github.io/isolated-function/

Source and package:

- GitHub: https://github.com/Kikobeats/isolated-function
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/isolated-function
